full_text:
Yang Ren 楊任
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Ren (楊任). Fought well against Cao Cao’s forces at Yangping, lured out and killed in battle. Yang Ren was affiliated with Zhang Lu. Yang Ren lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
